markdown-fence-leak.rule: NEVER output markdown code fences (```) inside code files. Write raw code only.
markdown-fence-leak.fix: Strip all lines starting with ``` before saving file.

package-absolute-import.rule: Use module-relative imports (from models import X), NOT package-absolute (from backend.models import X).
package-absolute-import.fix: Replace 'from backend.X import Y' with 'from X import Y'.

missing-encoding.rule: Always specify encoding when opening files: open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8').
missing-encoding.fix: Add encoding='utf-8' to all open() calls.
